description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named coverity that runs on push to the coverity branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with environment variables for a Coverity scan token and several build flags. Check out the repository, cache and download the Coverity build tool, install dependencies, prepare the CI environment, build with the Coverity tool, and submit the build result to Coverity Scan if the workflow runs on the coverity branch.
